manifest.author: ioannisxirouxakis
manifest.changelog:
ioannisxirr's Instafel backup v51

Probably forgotten now, self-defeated, but magically got the urge to work on Instagram things again!

-Disabled the ability to swipe left from the carousel posts to get to the story/reels/posts menu (this has bothered me a lot).
-You can now infinitely swipe in carousel media.
-Enabled haptic feedback in all actions in the feed.
-You can now reply to stories with voice messages, media, GIFs and stickers.
-Fixed some crashes regarding adding to story.
manifest.name: ioannisxir's Instafel Backup
manifest.description: Yeah, most popular backup in the world!
